title: cynoglossum cheirifolium var. clavatum
intro: Cynoglossum cheirifolium var. clavatum is a plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is also known as the 'forked tongue' due to its unique shape and appearance. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Cynoglossum cheirifolium var. clavatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and its leaves and roots can be used for these purposes.
